questions.hindi: अगर मुझे पता होता, तो मैं आता।
options: If they had paid attention, they would have understood.
If you had tried, you would have succeeded.
If he had worked hard, he would have passed.
If I had known, I would have come.
questions.answer: If I had known, I would have come.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर मुझे पता होता, तो मैं आता।" = "If I had known, I would have come."

questions.sentence: If he had worked _____ he would have passed.
options: gotten
more
money
hard
questions.answer: hard
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If he had worked hard, he would have passed."

questions.sentence: If I had money, I woulds have bought this.
options: If I had money, I woulds have bought this.
If I had money, I would have bought this.
questions.answer: If I had money, I would have bought this.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If I had money, I would have bought this."

questions.hindi: अगर तुम मुझे बताते, तो मैं मदद करता।
options: If he had told the truth, we would have been happy.
If he had called earlier, we would have met.
If she had come early, we would have met.
If you had told me, I would have helped.
questions.answer: If you had told me, I would have helped.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर तुम मुझे बताते, तो मैं मदद करता।" = "If you had told me, I would have helped."

questions.sentence: If she had come _____ we would have met.
options: left
been
time
early
questions.answer: early
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If she had come early, we would have met."

questions.sentence: If we had time, we woulds have won.
options: If we had time, we woulds have won.
If we had time, we would have won.
questions.answer: If we had time, we would have won.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If we had time, we would have won."

questions.hindi: अगर मैं वहाँ होता, तो मैं यह देखता।
options: If she had asked me, I would have told her.
If I had known, I would have come.
If they had paid attention, they would have understood.
If I had been there, I would have seen this.
questions.answer: If I had been there, I would have seen this.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर मैं वहाँ होता, तो मैं यह देखता।" = "If I had been there, I would have seen this."

questions.sentence: If they had paid _____ they would have understood.
options: tried
worked
gotten
attention
questions.answer: attention
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If they had paid attention, they would have understood."

questions.sentence: If I had gotten a chance, I woulds have done this.
options: If I had gotten a chance, I woulds have done this.
If I had gotten a chance, I would have done this.
questions.answer: If I had gotten a chance, I would have done this.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If I had gotten a chance, I would have done this."

questions.hindi: अगर तुम सुनते, तो तुम सीख जाते।
options: If I had woken up, I would have seen it.
If you had told me, I would have helped.
If he had told the truth, we would have been happy.
If you had listened, you would have learned.
questions.answer: If you had listened, you would have learned.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर तुम सुनते, तो तुम सीख जाते।" = "If you had listened, you would have learned."

questions.sentence: If he had told the _____ we would have been happy.
options: called
come
left
truth
questions.answer: truth
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If he had told the truth, we would have been happy."

questions.sentence: If we had left early, we woulds have arrived on time.
options: If we had left early, we woulds have arrived on time.
If we had left early, we would have arrived on time.
questions.answer: If we had left early, we would have arrived on time.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If we had left early, we would have arrived on time."

questions.hindi: अगर मुझे यह पता होता, तो मैं ना करता।
options: If you had stopped me, I would not have gone.
If I had been there, I would have seen this.
If she had asked me, I would have told her.
If I had known this, I would not have done it.
questions.answer: If I had known this, I would not have done it.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर मुझे यह पता होता, तो मैं ना करता।" = "If I had known this, I would not have done it."

questions.sentence: If she had asked me, _____ would have told her.
options: known
paid
tried
I
questions.answer: I
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If she had asked me, I would have told her."

questions.sentence: If you had tried, you woulds have succeeded.
options: If you had tried, you woulds have succeeded.
If you had tried, you would have succeeded.
questions.answer: If you had tried, you would have succeeded.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If you had tried, you would have succeeded."

questions.hindi: अगर हमारे पास ज्यादा समय होता, तो हम और सीखते।
options: If I had money, I would have bought this.
If you had listened, you would have learned.
If I had woken up, I would have seen it.
If we had more time, we would have learned more.
questions.answer: If we had more time, we would have learned more.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर हमारे पास ज्यादा समय होता, तो हम और सीखते।" = "If we had more time, we would have learned more."

questions.sentence: If I had woken up, _____ would have seen it.
options: told
called
come
I
questions.answer: I
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If I had woken up, I would have seen it."

questions.sentence: If he had called earlier, we woulds have met.
options: If he had called earlier, we woulds have met.
If he had called earlier, we would have met.
questions.answer: If he had called earlier, we would have met.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If he had called earlier, we would have met."

questions.hindi: अगर वे तैयार होते, तो वे जीत जाते।
options: If we had time, we would have won.
If I had known this, I would not have done it.
If you had stopped me, I would not have gone.
If they had been ready, they would have won.
questions.answer: If they had been ready, they would have won.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर वे तैयार होते, तो वे जीत जाते।" = "If they had been ready, they would have won."

options: been

questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If you had stopped me, I would not have gone."
